ffmpeg.checksumSource: self-computed from the GitHub git-archive tarball of tag n7.1.1 (the macOS/Linux source build uses the version-tagged GitHub archive; Windows builds FFmpeg via vcpkg instead and does not use this tarball)

openh264.checksumSource: self-computed from the GitHub archive tarball (Cisco publishes no separate release asset or checksum for OpenH264); matches the value pinned by other distributors
